title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 09 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 09 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 09 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/08/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked sharply all the day.The main contract closed at 723,decreased of 1.36%. Traders are generally motivated toship, Speculative demand increases. Steel mills are mainly on the sidelines, and market turnover continues to pick up.PBF at Shandong port dealt 780 yuan/mt;,decrease 5-15 yuan/mt than yesterday.
